description_long: This is a medium-sized, open-deck steam-powered boat with a classic monohull design, featuring a prominent central smokestack and a low-profile superstructure. The hull is painted in a combination of dark and reddish-brown tones, with visible wear and realistic weathering effects. The deck is outfitted with various mechanical components, including a central engine housing, railings, and what appears to be a rudder and propeller assembly at the stern. The bow and stern are both slightly raised, and the boat has two tall, thin masts or flagpoles at either end. The interior is open and accessible, with seating and operational areas clearly visible. There is a small emblem or insignia on the hull near the bow, but no visible registration number or boat name.
description: A steam-powered, open-deck monohull boat with a central smokestack, dark and reddish-brown hull, and visible mechanical details. The boat features an open interior and realistic weathering.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the boat, central smokestack, open deck, and hull details with a visible emblem near the bow.
description_view_1: Front (bow) view highlighting the pointed bow, open interior, and central smokestack aligned with the boat's centerline.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the hull, deck layout, and stern mechanical components, including the rudder and propeller.
description_view_3: Rear (stern) view showing the rounded stern, propeller, rudder assembly, and open deck space.
